# Factor — worked examples

Motivation-layer drivers (`notation: factor`). Schema: methodology
`notations/ELEMENT_PRIMITIVES.md` §7.1.

Mirrored from the methodology canon
(`organizations/acme_corp/canon/elements/01_motivation/factors/`); consumed by

- `FACTOR-COMP-1.yaml` — internal driver (no PESTLE category).
